location: Dropped by the larger, club-wielding Second-Generation Albinauric enemies around the Temple Quarter ruins in Liurnia of the Lakes.
tactics: Head to the Temple Quarter grace, southwest of the Academy of Raya Lucaria; the half-sunken ruins there host several club-wielding Albinaurics.
Drop rate is low (around 4% at 100 Discovery) — rest at Temple Quarter to respawn enemies and repeat.
The same weapon also drops from red-skinned Second-Generation Albinaurics in Mohgwyn Palace, reachable quickly with the Pureblood Knight's Medal, though that area has tougher company.
Only the visibly club-wielding Albinaurics carry it — don't waste time on the small unarmed ones.
lore: A large curved club of dense wood, shaped like a crescent moon. Albinaurics who lack the finesse for curved swords favor it instead, trading precision for sheer weight and destructive force.

builds.name: Quality Strength/Dex hitter
builds.why: D-scaling in both Strength and Dexterity plus one of the higher base attack ratings among Great Hammers make it a strong pick for a quality build wanting raw damage without a pure one-stat investment.
